channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Understanding Cord Blood Donations and Their Role in Medical Treatments
item.description: The article explains the process of cord blood donations, which involve collecting blood from the umbilical cord after childbirth. This blood is rich in hematopoietic stem cells that can be used to tr...

item.title: North Bay police investigate vandalism at new waterfront site amid possible hate crime concerns
item.description: North Bay police are investigating a potential hate or bias-motivated incident following vandalism at the newly opened Waterfront Canada Place. The incident occurred shortly after the venue's opening,...

item.title: South African Coaches Lead Tanzanian Clubs in NBC Premier League Rivalry
item.description: The NBC Premier League in Tanzania is set for an intense tactical rivalry as South African coaches Manqoba Mngqithi and Steve Barker take charge of Young Africans (Yanga) and Simba respectively. Mngqi...

item.title: House Prosecutors to Present More Witnesses in VP Sara Impeachment Trial
item.description: The House prosecution panel is intensifying its case against Vice President Sara Duterte by adding more witnesses as the impeachment trial enters its second week. Prosecutors Leila de Lima and Chel Di...

item.title: Kenya Railways Revives Nairobi-Nyahururu Train Service
item.description: Kenya Railways has confirmed the continued operation of the Nairobi-Gilgil-Olkalou-Nyahururu train, which resumed services after a 46-year hiatus. The revival aims to boost freight movement, cut trans...

item.title: Vogue's 1977 Star Wars Fashion Shoot: A Surreal Blend of Sci-Fi and Luxury
item.description: In November 1977, the US Vogue magazine featured a groundbreaking photo shoot that merged the worlds of Star Wars and high fashion. Photographer Eisuke Ishimuro and stylist Jade Hobson collaborated wi...

item.title: Italian Beach Clubs Face Disputes Over Packed Lunch Policies
item.description: Customers at private Italian beach clubs are clashing with management over policies banning packed lunches, sparking debates about affordability and hospitality. At Il Tirreno in Lazio, patrons like B...

item.title: KUCCPS and KMTC Warn Against Fake Admission Scams
item.description: KUCCPS and KMTC have issued warnings to students and applicants about scams related to fake admission letters and fraudulent activities. The Kenya University and College Central Placement Service (KUC...

item.title: Government allows private sector to manage foot-and-mouth disease vaccination efforts
item.description: The South African government has agreed to permit private entities to import, distribute, and administer foot-and-mouth disease (FMD) vaccines, following pressure from farmer groups and legal action. ...

item.title: Springboks' young stars set for crucial Nations Championship clash against Scotland
item.description: The Springboks face Scotland in a pivotal Nations Championship match, offering key players like Evan Roos, Paul de Villiers, Embrose Papier, Cobus Wiese, and Quan Horn the chance to showcase their ski...

item.title: Tanzania rescues 160 trafficking victims in anti-exploitation efforts
item.description: Tanzanian authorities have successfully rescued 160 victims of human trafficking over eight months, revealing the scale of exploitation within and beyond the country. The victims, including 60 childre...

item.title: Oyo State School Abduction Resolved After 56-Day Rescue Operation
item.description: A group of 44 pupils and teachers kidnapped from three schools in Oyo State were safely rescued after a 56-day intelligence-led operation by Nigerian security agencies. The rescue operation, involving...

item.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce attend ex-teammate's wedding as NFL snub controversy unfolds
item.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce, the high-profile couple who recently celebrated their own lavish wedding, were spotted at the nuptials of former Kansas City Chiefs teammate Chase Smith-Schuster. The ev...

item.title: Andy Burnham's Tax Reform Proposals: Land Value Tax and Property Tax Reforms
item.description: The article explores Andy Burnham's potential tax reforms as a Labour leader, focusing on replacing stamp duty with land value taxes (LVT) and proportional property taxes. Burnham has long advocated f...

item.title: China Successfully Recovers Orbital Rocket Booster for First Time
item.description: China has achieved a historic milestone in space technology by successfully recovering an orbital rocket booster for the first time. The Long March 10B rocket's first stage was captured using a net-eq...

item.title: NDPHC rehabilitates 225MW Gbarain power plant in Bayelsa to boost electricity supply
item.description: The Niger Delta Power Holding Company (NDPHC) has handed over the rehabilitation of its Gbarain Power Plant in Bayelsa State to a joint venture between TILT Energy Limited and Schneider Electric. The ...

item.title: Yankees Comeback Wins as Nationals Fail in Ninth Inning
item.description: The Washington Nationals were poised for a victory over the New York Yankees on July 11, 2026, but their collapse in the ninth inning handed the win to New York. Manager Blake Butera made a controvers...

item.title: Lacson questions repeated hospital confinement of high-profile suspects and plans to review PNP hospital policies
item.description: Senator Panfilo “Ping” Lacson expressed concern over what he described as a recurring pattern in which prominent personalities suddenly require hospital confinement after being cited in contempt or ar...

item.title: US Citizen Tests Positive for Ebola in DR Congo as Outbreak Continues
item.description: A US citizen working for a humanitarian organization in the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC) has tested positive for the Bundibugyo strain of Ebola, according to the Centers for Disease Control and ...

item.title: Trump Threatens Iran Amid Regional Tensions Following Khamenei's Funeral
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump escalated tensions with Iran on Saturday after the funeral of Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, which reportedly featured open calls for his assassination. Trump, post...
